mapper.select: SELECT 'RC_CF_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, a.rcmmd_mforu_id as recommendId, a.disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, a.disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, count(a.rcmmd_mforu_id) contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu_list b ON a.rcmmd_mforu_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND a.disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND a.create_std_dtime = ( SELECT create_std_dtime FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() GROUP BY create_std_dtime ORDER BY create_std_dtime DESC ) GROUP BY a.rcmmd_mforu_id HAVING contentCount >= #{rcmmdCfTrackDispStandardCount} UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_SML_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, a.rcmmd_similar_track_id as recommendId, a.disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, a.disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, count(b.rcmmd_similar_track_id) contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list b ON a.rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id WHERE a.character_no =#{characterNo} AND a.disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND a.disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY a.rcmmd_similar_track_id HAVING contentCount >= #{similarTrackDispStandardCount} UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_ATST_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_artist_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, 0 as contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_MD_CN' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_listen_mood_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn, category_id as moodId, 0 as contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_listen_mood WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_GR_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, 0 as contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW()

SELECT a.rcmmd_artist_id, b.artist_id , b.artist_type, c.artist_nm, d.size, d.url, a.create_dtime, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_track_list WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = a.rcmmd_artist_id ) trackCount FROM tb_rcmmd_artist a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist_list b ON a.rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id INNER JOIN ted_artist c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artistimage d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id WHERE a.rcmmd_artist_id = #{recommendArtistId} ORDER BY b.disp_sn ASC
SELECT os_type, img_size size, img_url url, disp_sn FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'ALL' AND dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND img_disp_type = 'DEFAULT'
SELECT CHARACTER_NO , ARTIST_ID FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_ARTIST WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} GROUP BY CHARACTER_NO, ARTIST_ID ORDER BY ARTIST_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RCMMD_ARTIST SET DISP_STD_END_DT = now() WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND now() BETWEEN DISP_STD_START_DT AND DISP_STD_END_DT

INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_ARTIST (CHARACTER_NO, DISP_STD_START_DT, DISP_STD_END_DT, DISP_SN, CREATE_DTIME, CREATE_STD_DTIME, DEL_TARGET_YN) VALUES (#{recommendArtistDto.characterNo}, now(), addtime(adddate(curdate(), - weekday(curdate()) + 6), '23:59:59'), #{recommendArtistDto.dispSn}, now(), now(), 'Y')
INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_ARTIST_LIST (rcmmd_artist_id, artist_id, artist_type, disp_sn) VALUES (#{rcmmdArtistId}, #{artistId}, #{artistType}, #{dispSn})
INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_ARTIST_TRACK_LIST (rcmmd_artist_id, track_id, disp_sn) VALUES (#{rcmmdArtistId}, #{trackId}, #{dispSn})
mapper.select: SELECT B.SVC_GENRE_ID, C.TRACK_ID FROM ( SELECT * FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_GENRE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo}) A INNER JOIN TB_MAP_PREFER_GENRE_SVC_GENRE B ON A.PREFER_GENRE_ID = B.PREFER_GENRE_ID INNER JOIN TB_MAP_SVC_GENRE_TRACK C ON B.SVC_GENRE_ID = C.SVC_GENRE_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID, TOTAL_LIST_CNT FROM ( SELECT I.CHARACTER_NO, I.TRACK_ID, CASE WHEN LIKE_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN I.TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT + 10 ELSE I.TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT END AS TOTAL_LIST_CNT FROM ( SELECT CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID, sum(LISTEN_CNT) AS TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT FROM TB_MOST_LISTEN_TRACK_BYDAY WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND adddate(curdate(), -7) <= LISTEN_DT GROUP BY CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID) I LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND addtime(adddate(curdate(), -7), '00:00:00') <= UPDATE_DTIME) TCL ON TCL.LIKE_TYPE = 'TRACK' AND I.TRACK_ID = TCL.LIKE_TYPE_ID) J WHERE TOTAL_LIST_CNT >= 3) D ON C.TRACK_ID = D.TRACK_ID ORDER BY D.TOTAL_LIST_CNT DESC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_PREFER_GENRE_SIMILAR_TRACK (CHARACTER_NO, DISP_STD_START_DT, DISP_STD_END_DT, SVC_GENRE_ID, DISP_SN, CREATE_DTIME, CREATE_STD_DTIME, DEL_TARGET_YN) VALUES (#{similarTrack.characterNo}, now(), date_add(CURDATE(), interval 24*60*60 - 1 second), #{similarTrack.svcGenreId}, #{similarTrack.dispSn}, now(), now(), 'Y')
UPDATE TB_RCMMD_PREFER_GENRE_SIMILAR_TRACK SET DISP_STD_END_DT = now() WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND now() BETWEEN DISP_STD_START_DT AND DISP_STD_END_DT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_RCMMD_PREFER_GENRE_SIMILAR_TRACK_LIST (rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id, track_id, disp_sn) VALUES (#{rcmmdPreferGenreSimilarTrackId}, #{trackId}, #{dispSn})
